tEn: PVT v2: Improved Baselines with Pyramid Vision Transformer
tZh: PVT v2：改进的金字塔视觉Transformer基线
sEn: PVT v2 improves PVT v1 with linear attention, overlapping patch embedding, and convolutional FFN, achieving SOTA on vision tasks.
sZh: PVT v2通过线性注意力、重叠块嵌入和卷积前馈网络改进PVT v1，在视觉任务上达到SOTA。
absEn: Transformer recently has presented encouraging progress in computer vision. In this work, we present new baselines by improving the original Pyramid Vision Transformer (PVT v1) by adding three designs, including (1) linear complexity attention layer, (2) overlapping patch embedding, and (3) convolutional feed-forward network. With these modifications, PVT v2 reduces the computational complexity of PVT v1 to linear and achieves significant improvements on fundamental vision tasks such as classification, detection, and segmentation. Notably, the proposed PVT v2 achieves comparable or better performances than recent works such as Swin Transformer. We hope this work will facilitate state-of-the-art Transformer researches in computer vision. Code is available at https://github.com/whai362/PVT.
absZh: Transformer最近在计算机视觉领域取得了令人鼓舞的进展。在这项工作中，我们通过改进原始的金字塔视觉Transformer（PVT v1），添加了三种设计，包括（1）线性复杂度注意力层，（2）重叠块嵌入，以及（3）卷积前馈网络，提出了新的基线。通过这些修改，PVT v2将PVT v1的计算复杂度降低到线性，并在分类、检测和分割等基本视觉任务上取得了显著改进。值得注意的是，所提出的PVT v2取得了与Swin Transformer等近期工作相当或更好的性能。我们希望这项工作能促进计算机视觉领域最先进的Transformer研究。代码可在https://github.com/whai362/PVT获取。

contrib.en: Proposes linear spatial reduction attention (SRA) layer with average pooling, reducing complexity to linear.
contrib.zh: 提出使用平均池化的线性空间缩减注意力层，将复杂度降至线性。

contrib.en: Introduces overlapping patch embedding to model local continuity of images.
contrib.zh: 引入重叠补丁嵌入以建模图像的局部连续性。

contrib.en: Adds convolutional feed-forward network with zero-padding to capture local continuity and remove fixed position encoding.
contrib.zh: 添加带零填充的卷积前馈网络以捕获局部连续性并移除固定位置编码。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art results on ImageNet classification, COCO detection, and ADE20K segmentation.
contrib.zh: 在ImageNet分类、COCO检测和ADE20K分割上取得最先进结果。

contrib.en: Provides a family of models (B0-B5) with varying sizes, outperforming Swin Transformer and Twins.
contrib.zh: 提供一系列不同规模的模型（B0-B5），性能优于Swin Transformer和Twins。

limits.en: Evaluation limited to image classification, object detection, and semantic segmentation tasks.
limits.zh: 评估仅限于图像分类、目标检测和语义分割任务。

limits.en: Performance may degrade on tasks requiring very high-resolution inputs beyond tested scales.
limits.zh: 在超出测试尺度的极高分辨率输入任务上性能可能下降。

limits.en: Ablation studies only on PVT v2-B2 variant; other sizes may show different trade-offs.
limits.zh: 消融研究仅在PVT v2-B2变体上进行；其他规模可能表现出不同的权衡。

limits.en: Does not explore integration with other advanced architectures like MLP-based backbones.
limits.zh: 未探索与其他先进架构（如基于MLP的主干网络）的集成。

items.en: Transformer recently has presented encouraging progress in computer vision. In this work, we present new baselines by improving the original Pyramid Vision Transformer (PVT v1) by adding three designs, including (1) linear complexity attention layer, (2) overlapping patch embedding, and (3) convolutional feed-forward network. With these modifications, PVT v2 reduces the computational complexity of PVT v1 to linear and achieves significant improvements on fundamental vision tasks such as classification, detection, and segmentation. Notably, the proposed PVT v2 achieves comparable or better performances than recent works such as Swin Transformer. We hope this work will facilitate state-of-the-art Transformer researches in computer vision. Code is available at https://github.com/whai362/PVT.
items.zh: Transformer近期在计算机视觉领域取得了令人鼓舞的进展。本文通过改进原始金字塔视觉Transformer（PVT v1），添加了三种设计，包括（1）线性复杂度注意力层，（2）重叠块嵌入，以及（3）卷积前馈网络，提出了新的基线。通过这些修改，PVT v2将PVT v1的计算复杂度降低为线性，并在分类、检测和分割等基础视觉任务上取得了显著改进。值得注意的是，所提出的PVT v2取得了与Swin Transformer等近期工作相当或更好的性能。我们希望这项工作能促进计算机视觉中前沿Transformer的研究。代码可在https://github.com/whai362/PVT获取。

items.en: Recent studies on vision Transformer are converging on the backbone network [8, 31, 33, 34, 23, 36, 10, 5] designed for downstream vision tasks, such as image classification, object detection, instance and semantic segmentation. To date, there have been some promising results. For example, Vision Transformer (ViT) [8] first proves that a pure Transformer can archive state-of-the-art performance in image classification. Pyramid Vision Transformer (PVT v1) [33] shows that a pure Transformer backbone can also surpass CNN counterparts in dense prediction tasks such as detection and segmentation tasks [22, 41]. After that, Swin Transformer [23], CoaT [36], LeViT [10], and Twins [5] further improve the classification, detection, and segmentation performance with Transformer backbones.
items.zh: 近期关于视觉Transformer的研究正汇聚于为下游视觉任务（如图像分类、目标检测、实例和语义分割）设计的骨干网络[8, 31, 33, 34, 23, 36, 10, 5]。迄今为止，已有一些令人鼓舞的结果。例如，Vision Transformer（ViT）[8]首次证明纯Transformer可以在图像分类中达到最先进的性能。金字塔视觉Transformer（PVT v1）[33]表明，纯Transformer骨干在密集预测任务（如检测和分割任务[22, 41]）中也能超越CNN对应模型。此后，Swin Transformer [23]、CoaT [36]、LeViT [10]和Twins [5]进一步提升了基于Transformer骨干的分类、检测和分割性能。

items.en: This work aims to establish stronger and more feasible baselines built on the PVT v1 framework. We report that three design improvements, namely (1) linear complexity attention layer, (2) overlapping patch embedding, and (3) convolutional feed-forward network are orthogonal to the PVT v1 framework, and when used with PVT v1, they can bring better image classification, object detection, instance and semantic segmentation performance. The improved framework is termed as PVT v2. Specifically, PVT v2-B5111 PVT v2 has 6 different size variants, from B0 to B5 according to the parameter number. yields 83.8% top-1 error on ImageNet, which is better than Swin-B [23] and Twins-SVT-L [5], while our model has fewer parameters and GFLOPs. Moreover, GFL [19] with PVT-B2 archives 50.2 AP on COCO val2017, 2.6 AP higher than the one with Swin-T [23], 5.7 AP higher than the one with ResNet50 [13]. We hope these improved baselines will provide a reference for future research in vision Transformer.
items.zh: 本文旨在基于PVT v1框架建立更强、更可行的基线。我们报告了三种设计改进，即（1）线性复杂度注意力层，（2）重叠块嵌入，以及（3）卷积前馈网络，这些改进与PVT v1框架正交，当与PVT v1结合使用时，可以带来更好的图像分类、目标检测、实例和语义分割性能。改进后的框架称为PVT v2。具体来说，PVT v2-B5111 PVT v2有6种不同大小的变体，从B0到B5，根据参数数量划分。在ImageNet上达到83.8%的top-1错误率，优于Swin-B [23]和Twins-SVT-L [5]，同时我们的模型参数和GFLOPs更少。此外，使用PVT-B2的GFL [19]在COCO val2017上达到50.2 AP，比使用Swin-T [23]的高2.6 AP，比使用ResNet50 [13]的高5.7 AP。我们希望这些改进的基线能为未来视觉Transformer的研究提供参考。

items.en: We mainly discuss transformer backbones related to this work. ViT [8] treats each image as a sequence of tokens (patches) with a fixed length, and then feeds them to multiple Transformer layers to perform classification. It is the first work to prove that a pure Transformer can also archive state-of-the-art performance in image classification when training data is sufficient (e.g., ImageNet-22k [7], JFT-300M). DeiT [31] further explores a data-efficient training strategy and a distillation approach for ViT.
items.zh: 我们主要讨论与本文相关的Transformer骨干。ViT [8]将每张图像视为固定长度的标记（块）序列，然后将其输入多个Transformer层进行分类。这是第一个证明纯Transformer在训练数据充足（如ImageNet-22k [7]、JFT-300M）时也能在图像分类中达到最先进性能的工作。DeiT [31]进一步探索了数据高效的训练策略和ViT的蒸馏方法。

items.en: To improve image classification performance, recent methods make tailored changes to ViT. T2T ViT [37] concatenates tokens within an overlapping sliding window into one token progressively. TNT [11] utilizes inner and outer Transformer blocks to generate pixel and patch embeddings respectively. CPVT [6] replaces the fixed size position embedding in ViT with conditional position encodings, making it easier to process images of arbitrary resolution. CrossViT [2] processes image patches of different sizes via a dual-branch Transformer. LocalViT [20] incorporates depth-wise convolution into vision Transformers to improve the local continuity of features.
items.zh: 为了提高图像分类性能，近期方法对ViT进行了针对性修改。T2T ViT [37]将重叠滑动窗口内的标记逐步拼接成一个标记。TNT [11]利用内部和外部Transformer块分别生成像素和块嵌入。CPVT [6]用条件位置编码替换ViT中的固定大小位置嵌入，使其更容易处理任意分辨率的图像。CrossViT [2]通过双分支Transformer处理不同大小的图像块。LocalViT [20]将深度可分离卷积引入视觉Transformer，以改善特征的局部连续性。

items.en: To adapt to dense prediction tasks such as object detection, instance and semantic segmentation, there are also some methods [33, 23, 34, 36, 10, 5] to introduce the pyramid structure in CNNs to the design of Transformer backbones. PVT v1 is the first pyramid structure Transformer, which presents a hierarchical Transformer with four stages, showing that a pure Transformer backbone can be as versatile as CNN counterparts and performs better in detection and segmentation tasks. After that, some improvements [23, 34, 36, 10, 5] are made to enhance the local continuity of features and to remove fixed size position embedding. For example, Swin Transformer [23] replaces fixed size position embedding with relative position biases, and restricts self-attention within shifted windows. CvT [34], CoaT [36], and LeViT [10] introduce convolution-like operations into vision Transformers. Twins [5] combines local attention and global attention mechanisms to obtain stronger feature representation.
items.zh: 为了适应目标检测、实例和语义分割等密集预测任务，还有一些方法[33, 23, 34, 36, 10, 5]将CNN中的金字塔结构引入Transformer骨干设计。PVT v1是第一个金字塔结构Transformer，它提出了一个包含四个阶段的分层Transformer，表明纯Transformer骨干可以像CNN对应模型一样通用，并在检测和分割任务中表现更好。此后，一些改进[23, 34, 36, 10, 5]旨在增强特征的局部连续性并去除固定大小位置嵌入。例如，Swin Transformer [23]用相对位置偏置替换固定大小位置嵌入，并将自注意力限制在移位窗口内。CvT [34]、CoaT [36]和LeViT [10]将卷积类操作引入视觉Transformer。Twins [5]结合了局部注意力和全局注意力机制以获得更强的特征表示。

items.en: There are three main limitations in PVT v1 [33] as follows: (1) Similar to ViT [8], when processing high-resolution input (e.g., shorter side being 800 pixels), the computational complexity of PVT v1 is relatively large. (2) PVT v1 [33] treats an image as a sequence of non-overlapping patches, which loses the local continuity of the image to a certain extent; (3) The position encoding in PVT v1 is fixed-size, which is inflexible for process images of arbitrary size. These problems limit the performance of PVT v1 on vision tasks.
items.zh: PVT v1 [33]存在三个主要局限性：（1）与ViT [8]类似，处理高分辨率输入（例如短边为800像素）时，PVT v1的计算复杂度较大。（2）PVT v1 [33]将图像视为非重叠块的序列，这在一定程度上失去了图像的局部连续性；（3）PVT v1中的位置编码是固定大小的，处理任意大小图像时不够灵活。这些问题限制了PVT v1在视觉任务上的性能。

items.en: To address these issues, we propose PVT v2, which improves PVT v1 through three designs, which are listed in Sec 3.2, 3.3, and 3.4.
items.zh: 为了解决这些问题，我们提出了PVT v2，通过三种设计改进了PVT v1，这些设计分别在第3.2、3.3和3.4节中列出。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Comparison of SRA in PVT v1 and linear SRA in PVT v2.
items.capZh: 图1：PVT v1中的SRA与PVT v2中的线性SRA的比较。

items.en: First, to reduce the high computational cost caused by attention operations, we propose linear spatial reduction attention (SRA) layer as illustrated in Fig. 1. Different from SRA [33] which uses convolutions for spatial reduction, linear SRA uses average pooling to reduce the spatial dimension (i.e., h×wℎ𝑤h\times w) to a fixed size (i.e., P×P𝑃𝑃P\times P) before the attention operation. So linear SRA enjoys linear computational and memory costs like a convolutional layer. Specifically, given an input of size h×w×cℎ𝑤𝑐h\times w\times c, the complexity of SRA and linear SRA are:
items.zh: 首先，为了降低注意力操作带来的高计算成本，我们提出了线性空间缩减注意力（SRA）层，如图1所示。与使用卷积进行空间缩减的SRA [33]不同，线性SRA在注意力操作之前使用平均池化将空间维度（即h×w）缩减为固定大小（即P×P）。因此，线性SRA像卷积层一样具有线性的计算和内存成本。具体来说，给定大小为h×w×c的输入，SRA和线性SRA的复杂度分别为：

items.en: where R𝑅R is the spatial reduction ratio of SRA [33]. P𝑃P is the pooling size of linear SRA, which is set to 7.
items.zh: 其中R是SRA [33]的空间缩减比率。P是线性SRA的池化大小，设置为7。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Two improvements in PVT v2. (1) Overlapping Patch Embedding. (2) Convolutional Feed Forward Network.
items.capZh: 图2：PVT v2的两项改进。（1）重叠块嵌入。（2）卷积前馈网络。

items.en: Second, to model the local continuity information, we utilize overlapping patch embedding to tokenize images. As shown in Fig. 2(a), we enlarge the patch window, making adjacent windows overlap by half of the area, and pad the feature map with zeros to keep the resolution. In this work, we use convolution with zero paddings to implement overlapping patch embedding. Specifically, given an input of size h×w×cℎ𝑤𝑐h\times w\times c, we feed it to a convolution with the stride of S𝑆S, the kernel size of 2​S−12𝑆12S-1, the padding size of S−1𝑆1S-1, and the kernel number of c′superscript𝑐′c^{\prime}. The output size is hS×wS×C′ℎ𝑆𝑤𝑆superscript𝐶′\frac{h}{S}\times\frac{w}{S}\times C^{\prime}.
items.zh: 其次，为了建模局部连续性信息，我们利用重叠块嵌入对图像进行标记化。如图2(a)所示，我们放大块窗口，使相邻窗口重叠一半面积，并用零填充特征图以保持分辨率。本文中，我们使用带零填充的卷积来实现重叠块嵌入。具体来说，给定大小为h×w×c的输入，我们将其输入到步长为S、卷积核大小为2S-1、填充大小为S-1、卷积核数量为c'的卷积中。输出大小为h/S × w/S × C'。

items.en: Third, inspired by [17, 6, 20], we remove the fixed-size position encoding [8], and introduce zero padding position encoding into PVT. As shown in Fig. 2(b), we add a 3×3333\times 3 depth-wise convolution [16] with the padding size of 1 between the first fully-connected (FC) layer and GELU [15] in feed-forward networks.
items.zh: 第三，受[17, 6, 20]启发，我们移除了固定大小的位置编码[8]，并将零填充位置编码引入PVT。如图2(b)所示，我们在前馈网络中的第一个全连接（FC）层和GELU [15]之间添加了一个填充大小为1的3×3深度可分离卷积[16]。

items.en: We scale up PVT v2 from B0 to B5 By changing the hyper-parameters. which are listed as follows:
items.zh: 我们通过改变超参数将PVT v2从B0扩展到B5，具体如下：

items.en: Sisubscript𝑆𝑖S_{i}: the stride of the overlapping patch embedding in Stage i𝑖i;
items.zh: Si：阶段i中重叠块嵌入的步长；

items.en: Cisubscript𝐶𝑖C_{i}: the channel number of the output of Stage i𝑖i;
items.zh: Ci：阶段i输出的通道数；

items.en: Lisubscript𝐿𝑖L_{i}: the number of encoder layers in Stage i𝑖i;
items.zh: Li：阶段i中编码器层的数量；

items.en: Risubscript𝑅𝑖R_{i}: the reduction ratio of the SRA in Stage i𝑖i;
items.zh: Ri：阶段i中SRA的缩减比率；

items.en: Pisubscript𝑃𝑖P_{i}: the adaptive average pooling size of the linear SRA in Stage i𝑖i;
items.zh: Pi：阶段i中线性SRA的自适应平均池化大小。

items.en: Nisubscript𝑁𝑖N_{i}: the head number of the Efficient Self-Attention in Stage i𝑖i;
items.zh: N_i：第i阶段高效自注意力机制的头数；

items.en: Eisubscript𝐸𝑖E_{i}: the expansion ratio of the feed-forward layer [32] in Stage i𝑖i;
items.zh: E_i：第i阶段前馈层[32]的扩展比率；

items.en: Tab. 1 shows the detailed information of PVT v2 series. Our design follows the principles of ResNet [14]. (1) the channel dimension increase while the spatial resolution shrink with the layer goes deeper. (2) Stage 3 is assigned to most of the computation cost.
items.zh: 表1展示了PVT v2系列的详细信息。我们的设计遵循ResNet[14]的原则。(1) 随着层数加深，通道维度增加而空间分辨率减小。(2) 第3阶段分配了大部分计算成本。

items.en: Combining these improvements, PVT v2 can (1) obtain more local continuity of images and feature maps; (2) process variable-resolution input more flexibly; (3) enjoy the same linear complexity as CNN.
items.zh: 结合这些改进，PVT v2能够：(1) 获得图像和特征图更强的局部连续性；(2) 更灵活地处理可变分辨率输入；(3) 享有与CNN相同的线性复杂度。

items.en: Settings. Image classification experiments are performed on the ImageNet-1K dataset [27], which comprises 1.28 million training images and 50K validation images from 1,000 categories. All models are trained on the training set for fair comparison and report the top-1 error on the validation set. We follow DeiT [31] and apply random cropping, random horizontal flipping [29], label-smoothing regularization [30], mixup [38], and random erasing [40] as data augmentations. During training, we employ AdamW [25] with a momentum of 0.9, a mini-batch size of 128, and a weight decay of 5×10−25superscript1025\times 10^{-2} to optimize models. The initial learning rate is set to 1×10−31superscript1031\times 10^{-3} and decreases following the cosine schedule [24]. All models are trained for 300 epochs from scratch on 8 V100 GPUs. We apply a center crop on the validation set to benchmark, where a 224×\times 224 patch is cropped to evaluate the classification accuracy.
items.zh: 设置。图像分类实验在ImageNet-1K数据集[27]上进行，该数据集包含来自1000个类别的128万张训练图像和5万张验证图像。所有模型在训练集上训练以进行公平比较，并报告验证集上的top-1错误率。我们遵循DeiT[31]，采用随机裁剪、随机水平翻转[29]、标签平滑正则化[30]、mixup[38]和随机擦除[40]作为数据增强。训练期间，我们使用AdamW[25]优化器，动量0.9，小批量大小128，权重衰减5×10^{-2}。初始学习率设为1×10^{-3}，并按照余弦调度[24]衰减。所有模型在8块V100 GPU上从头训练300个epoch。我们在验证集上应用中心裁剪进行基准测试，裁剪224×224的块来评估分类准确率。

items.en: Results. In Tab. 2, we see that PVT v2 is the state-of-the-art method on ImageNet-1K classification. Compared to PVT, PVT v2 has similar flops and parameters, but the image classification accuracy is greatly improved. For example, PVT v2-B1 is 3.6% higher than PVT v1-Tiny, and PVT v2-B4 is 1.9% higher than PVT-Large.
items.zh: 结果。在表2中，我们看到PVT v2是ImageNet-1K分类上的最先进方法。与PVT相比，PVT v2具有相似的FLOPs和参数量，但图像分类准确率大幅提升。例如，PVT v2-B1比PVT v1-Tiny高3.6%，PVT v2-B4比PVT-Large高1.9%。

items.en: Compared to other recent counterparts, PVT v2 series also has large advantages in terms of accuracy and model size. For example, PVT v2-B5 achieves 83.8% ImageNet top-1 accuracy, which is 0.5% higher than Swin Transformer [23] and Twins [5], while our parameters and FLOPS are fewer.
items.zh: 与其他近期同类方法相比，PVT v2系列在准确率和模型大小方面也具有很大优势。例如，PVT v2-B5达到83.8%的ImageNet top-1准确率，比Swin Transformer[23]和Twins[5]高0.5%，而我们的参数量和FLOPs更少。

items.en: Settings. Object detection experiments are conducted on the challenging COCO benchmark [22]. All models are trained on COCO train2017 (118k images) and evaluated on val2017 (5k images). We verify the effectiveness of PVT v2 backbones on top of mainstream detectors, including RetinaNet [21], Mask R-CNN [12], Cascade Mask R-CNN [1], ATSS [39], GFL [19], and Sparse R-CNN [28]. Before training, we use the weights pre-trained on ImageNet to initialize the backbone and Xavier [9] to initialize the newly added layers. We train all the models with batch size 16 on 8 V100 GPUs, and adopt AdamW [25] with an initial learning rate of 1×10−41superscript1041\times 10^{-4} as optimizer. Following common practices [21, 12, 3], we adopt 1×\times or 3×\times training schedule (i.e., 12 or 36 epochs) to train all detection models. The training image is resized to have a shorter side of 800 pixels, while the longer side does not exceed 1,333 pixels. When using the 3×\times training schedule, we randomly resize the shorter side of the input image within the range of [640,800]640800[640,800]. In the testing phase, the shorter side of the input image is fixed to 800 pixels.
items.zh: 设置。目标检测实验在具有挑战性的COCO基准[22]上进行。所有模型在COCO train2017（118k张图像）上训练，并在val2017（5k张图像）上评估。我们在主流检测器上验证PVT v2骨干网络的有效性，包括RetinaNet[21]、Mask R-CNN[12]、Cascade Mask R-CNN[1]、ATSS[39]、GFL[19]和Sparse R-CNN[28]。训练前，我们使用在ImageNet上预训练的权重初始化骨干网络，并使用Xavier[9]初始化新添加的层。我们在8块V100 GPU上以批量大小16训练所有模型，并采用AdamW[25]优化器，初始学习率1×10^{-4}。遵循常见做法[21, 12, 3]，我们采用1×或3×训练计划（即12或36个epoch）训练所有检测模型。训练图像被调整为短边800像素，长边不超过1333像素。当使用3×训练计划时，我们在[640,800]范围内随机调整输入图像的短边。在测试阶段，输入图像的短边固定为800像素。

items.en: Results. As reported in Tab. 3, PVT v2 significantly outperforms PVT v1 on both one-stage and two-stage object detectors with similar model size. For example, PVT v2-B4 archive 46.1 AP on top of RetinaNet [21], and 47.5 APb on top of Mask R-CNN [12], surpassing the models with PVT v1 by 3.5 AP and 4.6 APb, respectively. We present some qualitative object detection and instance segmentation results on COCO val2017 [22] in Fig. 3, which also shows the good performance of our models.
items.zh: 结果。如表3所示，PVT v2在单阶段和两阶段目标检测器上均显著优于PVT v1，且模型大小相似。例如，PVT v2-B4在RetinaNet[21]上达到46.1 AP，在Mask R-CNN[12]上达到47.5 APb，分别超过PVT v1模型3.5 AP和4.6 APb。我们在图3中展示了COCO val2017[22]上的一些定性目标检测和实例分割结果，也显示了我们的模型的良好性能。

items.en: For a fair comparison between PVT v2 and Swin Transformer [23], we keep all settings the same, including ImageNet-1K pre-training and COCO fine-tuning strategies. We evaluate Swin Transformer and PVT v2 on four state-of-the-arts detectors, including Cascade R-CNN [1], ATSS [39], GFL [19], and Sparse R-CNN [28]. We see PVT v2 obtain much better AP than Swin Transformer among all the detectors, showing its better feature representation ability. For example, on ATSS, PVT v2 has similar parameters and flops compared to Swin-T, but PVT v2 achieves 49.9 AP, which is 2.7 higher than Swin-T. Our PVT v2-Li can largely reduce the computation from 258 to 194 GFLOPs, while only sacrificing a little performance.
items.zh: 为了公平比较PVT v2和Swin Transformer[23]，我们保持所有设置相同，包括ImageNet-1K预训练和COCO微调策略。我们在四种最先进的检测器上评估Swin Transformer和PVT v2，包括Cascade R-CNN[1]、ATSS[39]、GFL[19]和Sparse R-CNN[28]。我们看到PVT v2在所有检测器上获得比Swin Transformer更好的AP，显示出其更好的特征表示能力。例如，在ATSS上，PVT v2与Swin-T相比具有相似的参数量和FLOPs，但PVT v2达到49.9 AP，比Swin-T高2.7。我们的PVT v2-Li可以将计算量从258 GFLOPs大幅降低到194 GFLOPs，而性能仅略有牺牲。

items.en: Settings. Following PVT v1 [33], we choose ADE20K [41] to benchmark the performance of semantic segmentation. For a fair comparison, we test the performance of PVT v2 backbones by applying it to Semantic FPN [18]. In the training phase, the backbone is initialized with the weights pre-trained on ImageNet [7], and the newly added layers are initialized with Xavier [9]. We optimize our models using AdamW [25] with an initial learning rate of 1e-4. Following common practices [18, 4], we train our models for 40k iterations with a batch size of 16 on 4 V100 GPUs. The learning rate is decayed following the polynomial decay schedule with a power of 0.9. We randomly resize and crop the image to 512×512512512512\times 512 for training, and rescale to have a shorter side of 512 pixels during testing.
items.zh: 设置。遵循PVT v1[33]，我们选择ADE20K[41]来基准测试语义分割的性能。为了公平比较，我们通过将PVT v2骨干网络应用于Semantic FPN[18]来测试其性能。在训练阶段，骨干网络使用在ImageNet[7]上预训练的权重初始化，新添加的层使用Xavier[9]初始化。我们使用AdamW[25]优化器，初始学习率1e-4。遵循常见做法[18, 4]，我们在4块V100 GPU上以批量大小16训练模型40k次迭代。学习率按照多项式衰减调度衰减，幂次为0.9。我们随机调整大小并裁剪图像至512×512进行训练，测试时缩放至短边512像素。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Qualitative results of object detection and instance segmentation on COCO val2017 [22], and semantic segmentation on ADE20K [41]. The results (from left to right) are generated by PVT v2-B2-based RetinaNet [21], Mask R-CNN [12], and Semantic FPN [18], respectively.
items.capZh: 图3：COCO val2017[22]上的目标检测和实例分割，以及ADE20K[41]上的语义分割的定性结果。结果（从左到右）分别由基于PVT v2-B2的RetinaNet[21]、Mask R-CNN[12]和Semantic FPN[18]生成。

items.en: Results. As shown in Tab. 5, when using Semantic FPN [18] for semantic segmentation, PVT v2 consistently outperforms PVT v1 [33] and other counterparts. For example, with almost the same number of parameters and GFLOPs, PVT v2-B1/B2/B3/B4 are at least 5.3% higher than PVT v1-Tiny/Small/Medium/Large. Moreover, although the GFLOPs of PVT-Large are 12% lower than those of ResNeXt101-64x4d, the mIoU is still 8.5 points higher (48.7 vs 40.2). In Fig. 3, we also visualize some qualitative semantic segmentation results on ADE20K [41]. These results demonstrate that PVT v2 backbones can extract powerful features for semantic segmentation, benefiting from the improved designs.
items.zh: 结果。如表5所示，当使用Semantic FPN[18]进行语义分割时，PVT v2始终优于PVT v1[33]和其他同类方法。例如，在参数量和GFLOPs几乎相同的情况下，PVT v2-B1/B2/B3/B4比PVT v1-Tiny/Small/Medium/Large至少高5.3%。此外，尽管PVT-Large的GFLOPs比ResNeXt101-64x4d低12%，但其mIoU仍高出8.5个百分点（48.7 vs 40.2）。在图3中，我们还展示了ADE20K[41]上的一些定性语义分割结果。这些结果表明，得益于改进的设计，PVT v2骨干网络能够为语义分割提取强大的特征。

items.en: Ablation experiments of PVT v2 is reported in Tab. 6. We see that all three designs can improve the model in terms of performance, parameter number, or computation overhead.
items.zh: PVT v2的消融实验报告在表6中。我们看到，所有三种设计都能在性能、参数量或计算开销方面改进模型。

items.en: Overlapping patch embedding (OPE) is important. Comparing #1 and #2 in Tab. 6, the model with OPE obtains better top-1 accuracy (81.1% vs. 79.8%) on ImageNet and better AP (42.2% vs. 40.4%) on COCO than the one with original patch embedding (PE) [8]. OPE is effective because it can model the local continuity of images and feature map via the overlapping sliding window.
items.zh: 重叠补丁嵌入（OPE）很重要。比较表6中的#1和#2，使用OPE的模型在ImageNet上获得更好的top-1准确率（81.1% vs. 79.8%），在COCO上获得更好的AP（42.2% vs. 40.4%），优于使用原始补丁嵌入（PE）[8]的模型。OPE之所以有效，是因为它通过重叠滑动窗口建模了图像和特征图的局部连续性。

items.en: Convolutional feed-forward network (CFFN) matters. Compared to original feed-forward network (FFN) [8], our CFFN contains a zero-padding convolutional layer. which can capture the local continuity of the input tensor. In addition, due to the positional information introduced by zero-padding in OPE and CFFN, we can remove the fixed-size positional embeddings used in PVT v1, making the model flexible to handle variable resolution inputs. As reported in #2 and #3 in Tab. 6, CFFN brings 0.9 points improvement on ImageNet (82.0% vs. 81.1%) and 2.4 points improvement on COCO, which demonstrates its effectiveness.
items.zh: 卷积前馈网络（CFFN）很重要。与原始前馈网络（FFN）[8]相比，我们的CFFN包含一个零填充卷积层，可以捕获输入张量的局部连续性。此外，由于OPE和CFFN中零填充引入的位置信息，我们可以移除PVT v1中使用的固定大小位置嵌入，使模型能够灵活处理可变分辨率输入。如表6中#2和#3所示，CFFN在ImageNet上带来0.9个百分点的提升（82.0% vs. 81.1%），在COCO上带来2.4个百分点的提升，证明了其有效性。

items.en: Linear SRA (LSRA) contributes to a better model. As reported in #3 and #4 in Tab. 6, compared to SRA [33], our LSRA significantly reduces the computation overhead (GFLOPs) of the model by 22%, while keeping a comparable top-1 accuracy on ImageNet (82.1% vs. 82.0%), and only 1 point lower AP on COCO (43.6 vs. 44.6). These results show the low computational cost and good effect of LSRA.
items.zh: 线性SRA（LSRA）有助于更好的模型。如表6中#3和#4所示，与SRA[33]相比，我们的LSRA显著降低了模型的计算开销（GFLOPs）22%，同时在ImageNet上保持了相当的top-1准确率（82.1% vs. 82.0%），在COCO上仅低1个AP（43.6 vs. 44.6）。这些结果表明了LSRA的低计算成本和良好效果。

items.en: As shown in Figure 4, with increasing input scale, the GFLOPs growth rate of the proposed PVT v2-B2-Li is much lower than that of PVT v1-Small [33], and is similar to that of ResNet-50 [13]. This result proves that our PVT v2-Li successfully addresses the high computational overhead problem caused by the attention layer.
items.zh: 如图4所示，随着输入尺度的增加，所提出的PVT v2-B2-Li的GFLOPs增长率远低于PVT v1-Small[33]，且与ResNet-50[13]相似。这一结果证明我们的PVT v2-Li成功解决了由注意力层引起的高计算开销问题。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Models’ GFLOPs under different input scales. The growth rate of GFLOPs: ViT-Small/16 [8]>>ViT-Small/32 [8]>>PVT v1-Small [33]>>ResNet50 [14]>>PVT v2-B2-Li (ours).
items.capZh: 图4：不同输入尺度下模型的GFLOPs。GFLOPs增长率：ViT-Small/16[8]>>ViT-Small/32[8]>>PVT v1-Small[33]>>ResNet50[14]>>PVT v2-B2-Li（我们的）。

items.en: We study the limitations of Pyramid Vision Transformer (PVT v1) and improve it with three designs, which are overlapping patch embedding, convolutional feed-forward network, and linear spatial reduction attention layer. Extensive experiments on different tasks, such as image classification, object detection, and semantic segmentation demonstrate that the proposed PVT v2 is stronger than its predecessor PVT v1 and other state-of-the-art transformer-based backbones, under comparable numbers of parameters. We hope these improved baselines will provide a reference for future research in vision Transformer.
items.zh: 我们研究了金字塔视觉Transformer（PVT v1）的局限性，并通过三种设计对其进行了改进，即重叠补丁嵌入、卷积前馈网络和线性空间缩减注意力层。在图像分类、目标检测和语义分割等不同任务上的大量实验表明，所提出的PVT v2在可比参数量下，比其前身PVT v1和其他最先进的基于Transformer的骨干网络更强。我们希望这些改进的基线能为视觉Transformer的未来研究提供参考。
